name: WESTWATER RESOURCES, INC.
headquarters: Alabama (operations near Kellyton and Rockford, Alabama)
summary: Westwater Resources, Inc. is a battery-grade graphite processing company focused on developing the Kellyton Graphite Plant near Kellyton, Alabama, and the Coosa Graphite Deposit near Rockford, Alabama. The company produces ULTRA-CSPG (coated spherical purified graphite) using a patented process for use as Active Anode Material in electric vehicle batteries. It also produces graphite fines as a byproduct of the spheroidizing process.
